verify.reason: No cross-provider verifier configured for the gpt-5-4 routed model. The route() call already used task_type=session-verification cross-provider routing, so the route response IS the Round-A verdict.

addressed_in_flight: Medium #1: backup re-read race in migrate_one_set (fix at ai_router/migrate_lightweight_to_canonical_v4.py — now writes the parsed state dict to backup_path via _atomic_write_json instead of re-reading from disk; new regression test test_backup_uses_parsed_state_not_reread_from_disk)
